title: Turtle And Tortoise Origins
description: Adds the turtle and tortoise origins to Minecraft.
body:
![TnT Logo](https://imgur.com/B3j0yEh.png)

## Turtle 
***You are a bipedal turtle, the aquatic variant of shelled reptiles, and objectively the 2nd best animal.***
***
TURTLE SHELL
Your natural shell helps protect you by giving you 4 armor bars.

TURTLE DIET
Dried Kelp nourishes you as much as Steak would for a human.

SLOW METABOLISM
Due to your slow metabolism, you exhaust less.

ENTER SHELL
By entering your shell with primary, you gain resistance one and slowness two for 20 seconds, with a 60-second cooldown.
***
COLD-BLOODED
Because you are cold-blooded, you freeze in cold biomes and gain weakness one.

FLIPPERS
Because of your flippers, you gain slowness one on land.

VEGETARIAN
Due to the fact that you don't eat meat, you don't.

BULKY SHELL
Due to your large shell, you can't wear a chestplate.
***
## Tortoise
***You are a bipedal tortoise, the terrestrial variant of shelled reptiles, and objectively the best animal.***
***
TORTOISE SHELL
Your natural shell helps protect you by giving you 6 armor bars.

TORTOISE DIET
Carrots, Raw Potatoes, and Beetroots nourish you as much as Steak would for a human.

SLOW METABOLISM
Due to your slow metabolism, you exhaust less.

ENTER SHELL
By entering your shell with primary, you gain resistance one and slowness two for 20 seconds, with a 60-second cooldown.
***
SLOW AND STEADY
Due to your shell's mass, you have slowness one and 50% knockback resistance at all times.
***
COLD-BLOODED
Because you are cold-blooded, you freeze in cold biomes and gain weakness one.

CAN'T SWIM
Due to your heavy shell, it makes it almost impossible to swim.

VEGETARIAN
Due to the fact that you don't eat meat, you don't.

BULKY SHELL
Due to your large shell, you can't wear a chestplate.
***
Mod Commissioned By CheezBallzFTW
Credit for the mod idea and power names/descriptions should go to him.
